project_type: AWS CDK Python app for a serverless sleep audio pipeline
build_system: pip with requirements.txt; CDK CLI via npx; NODE_OPTIONS must be set to empty string in sandbox to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js preload error
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions; tests in tests/unit/; fixtures in tests/conftest.py
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -v to verify all tests pass. 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth to verify synthesized template is valid.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared ('') before running any Node/CDK commands due to sandbox proxy-bootstrap.js issue. Python 3.9 is the active system python (/usr/bin/python3). COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode allows pip and npm installs.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. Least privilege IAM, encryption at rest, private buckets. Commit messages use conventional type prefixes. Update ARCHITECTURE.md when adding resources.
key_patterns: Stack code in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py. Tests use conftest.py fixtures (app, template). Template fixture synthesizes CdkBaseStack and returns assertions.Template. Existing test verifies empty stack only has CDK::Metadata.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - CDK stack definitions; tests/unit/ - pytest tests; tests/conftest.py - shared fixtures; .github/workflows/ - CI
